description: Use this API to read a network sequence data file and add all the data specified in it to the working case. Allowed seq file formats are PSSE-15 through the current format. This API routine was first introduced in release 32.0.0. ierr = resqversion(vernum, ifile)

parameters.name: vernum
parameters.description: Version number corresponding to the format of the ifile. vernum is in the format of a psse release number. example: if ifile format is of psse-29.5.1: vernum = ‘29’ or = ‘29.5’ or = ‘29.5.1’. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ifile
parameters.description: Name of the power flow sequence data file. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
